query: Hvad er koordinaterne for København H station hos DSB?
criteria: Response should use the DSB station list API at https://www.dsb.dk/api/stations/getstationlist with q=kobenhavn (or similar) filter, then return stationLatitude and stationLongitude fields for København H. Should not invent coordinates.

query: List all DSB train stations in Denmark
criteria: Response should call the station list API at https://www.dsb.dk/api/stations/getstationlist (no q param, or via dsb_dk_api.py stations) and report ~320 stations. Should mention stationName field and that the endpoint returns the full list.

query: Hvor finder jeg planlagte sporarbejder hos DSB?
criteria: Response should reference https://www.dsb.dk/trafikinformation/planlagte-aendringer/ for planned changes/track work, and may also mention /trafikinformation/ for live disruptions.

query: kan jeg købe togbillet direkte via en api fra dsb?
criteria: Response must clearly state DSB has NO public booking API, no seat availability API, and no journey search API. Purchases must go through the website (/netbutik/) or the DSB mobile app.

query: Find stations matching 'aarhus' on dsb.dk and give me their URLs
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.dsb.dk/api/stations/getstationlist?q=aarhus and return stationName + stationUrl fields for matching stations (e.g., Aarhus H). Should mention that filtering is case-insensitive.

query: Hvad er Orange Fri?
criteria: Response should describe Orange Fri as an unlimited Orange product valid for 30 days, and reference URL /find-produkter-og-services/orange-fri/.

query: How do I log in to my DSB account programmatically?
criteria: Response must explain DSB uses Gigya (Social Login / CIAM) with API key 4_sgl-E5_0k4GxgwQJBsMWLQ, that login lives at /auth/log-ind/ (Danish) or /en/auth/login/ (English), and that there is no personal data API — account data is session-bound to Gigya.

query: ungdomskort dsb info
criteria: Response should reference the Ungdomskort product page at /find-produkter-og-services/ung/ungdomskort/ and identify it as the youth card for ages 16-25.

query: Vis mig hele sitemappet for DSB, men kun under trafik-information
criteria: Response should fetch https://www.dsb.dk/sitemap.xml and filter URLs by /trafik-information/ (or /trafikinformation/) prefix. Should mention there are ~1200 URLs total. Use of dsb_dk_api.py sitemap --prefix is acceptable.

query: I want details about Copenhagen Airport station
criteria: Response should reference station detail URL pattern /trafikinformation/stationer/kobenhavns-lufthavn-kastrup/ (or fetch via dsb_dk_api.py station-detail). May also use the station list API to find the station record.

query: what's the api endpoint to autocomplete station names on the journey search form?
criteria: Response must identify https://www.dsb.dk/api/stations/getstationlist?q=<query> as the autocomplete backend, GET method, no auth required.

query: Hvilke fordele har DSB Plus medlemmer?
criteria: Response should describe DSB Plus as a free loyalty programme with discounts on food, drinks, and experiences, listing partners like Tivoli, Louisiana Museum, Bakken, DanHostel. Reference root URL /dsb-plus/.

query: Hvor mange zoner koster det fra Roskilde til København? Find prisinfo
criteria: Response should direct user to /priser-og-zoner/ for fare/zone tables, and acknowledge there is no journey/pricing API — actual price calculation happens via the website's journey form (POST to /netbutik/resultat/).

query: give me the elevator status for DSB stations
criteria: Response should reference /trafikinformation/elevatorer for elevator status info. Should note the page is HTML and there is no documented JSON API for elevators.

query: Jeg vil tage cyklen med toget. Hvordan?
criteria: Response should reference Cykel-pladsbillet at /find-produkter-og-services/cykel-pladsbillet/ as the bicycle reservation product.

query: Hvad er forskellen mellem DSB erhverv og almindelige billetter?
criteria: Response should describe DSB Erhverv (business accounts) at /dsb-erhverv/, mention benefits like 20% savings over Storebælt and up to 50% on Erhverv cards, and may reference sub-pages /dsb-erhverv/co2/, /dsb-erhverv/checkind/, /dsb-erhverv/bp/.

query: Get me the JSON response for stations starting with 'oden'
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.dsb.dk/api/stations/getstationlist?q=oden and return raw JSON-style results including stationName, stationUrl, stationLatitude, stationLongitude, tags fields. Odense should appear in results.

query: show english version of dsb traffic info page
criteria: Response should provide /en/ prefix URL such as https://www.dsb.dk/en/trafikinformation/ (or note the English mirror is at /en/ for any URL).

query: Can I get a list of all facility tags / amenities at DSB stations?
criteria: Response should mention the tags field returned by the station list API and list common tag examples such as 'DSB Salg & Service', 'DSB 7-Eleven', 'Aflåst cykelparkering', 'Stationsstuer', 'Servicecenter'.

query: gruppebilletter til 12 personer dsb
criteria: Response should reference DSB gruppebillet at /find-produkter-og-services/dsb-gruppebillet/ and note the limit is up to 9 people, so 12 exceeds it — the user would need a different arrangement or contact DSB.
